title: In-flight closeouts registry
description: Runtime registry for concurrent-closeout collision detection. Written and read under flock ia/state/.closeout.lock. Entries older than 24 h are TTL-purged on next closeout start. Do NOT use ia/state/.id-counter.lock for this file — that lock is reserved for id-counter mutations only (invariant #13).

issue_id.description: Backlog issue id being closed (e.g. TECH-XXX).

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the closeout step 0 registered this entry.

pid.description: Process id of the agent shell running the closeout (best-effort; 0 when unknown).

hit_files.description: Repo-relative file paths that contain the issue id (collected by rg in step 0). Used for disjoint-purge collision detection.
